subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-02-02
subcodes.first_line: We are sorely in need of many teachers. But all the believers of God must be teachers of the Cause. Teaching the Cause is not only through the tongue...Every one of the believers of God must, at the very least, teach one new soul in a year.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما مبلغ خیای لازم داریم باید جمیع احباء مبلغ باشند  و تبلیغ بزبان تنها نیست  ...  هر یکی از احبای الهی باید در سال  اقلا یکی را تبلیغ کنند
subcodes.subjects: @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @methods of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
